articles.title: Cryptocurrencies waver as focus shifts to BitBot token claim
articles.description: Cryptocurrency prices have crashed hard in the past few weeks. The crash happened as Bitcoin supply increases and as hopes of a Fed cut increases. BitBot will start its token claim event on Thursday. Bitcoin and other cryptocurrency prices remained under pressure on Wednesday as investors waited for the next important catalyst. articles.title: US government transfers 4,000 BTC to Coinbase
articles.description: The US government has recently transferred around 3,940 Bitcoin (BTC) to Coinbase, according to data from Arkham Intelligence.The transfer involves a crypto wallet known to be controlled by the US government, originating from the seizure of Bitcoin from the Silk Road. The Silk Road was an infamous online marketplace on the dark web, dealing in illegal drugs, weapons, and other illicit goods,...

articles.title: 3 Reasons Why the ONDO Price Could Soar Toward $2
articles.description: Calls for Ondo (ONDO) to reach a new all-time high dominated the market after the price reached $1.48 on June 3. Yet, the token went against those wishes and is now 17.64% down from its peak. articles.title: Cardano devs outsmart DDoS attacker, stop disrupting attempt, and secure funds
articles.description: Cardano recently faced a DDoS attack that targeted staked ADA. But the attacker failed to disrupt the network as Cardano developers quickly mitigated the attempt and secured funds.On Tuesday, Raul Antonio, Fluid Tokens' CTO, reported that an attacker launched a distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack on the Cardano network, starting at block 10,487,530.Antonio said the attack involved...

articles.title: Cardano Network Thwarts DDoS Attack with No Disruption
articles.description: The Cardano blockchain suffered a DDoS attack that targeted tokens that were staked on the network, but the attack was stopped successfully.

articles.title: Cardano Network Successfully Fends Off DDoS Attack: Details
articles.description: Late Tuesday, the Cardano network experienced a distributed denial of service (DDoS) attack, an attempt characterized by a significant surge in malicious activity aimed at disrupting its operations. However, the robust mechanisms of the blockchain effectively mitigated the attack, ensuring continued stability and operation. Cardano Not Disrupted By the DDoS Attack According to @ElRaulito_cnft,...

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson names ‘good guys’ and ‘bastards’ in Cardano fairness list
articles.description: Hoskinson has placed YouTube channel Altcoin Daily top of a list of crypto news outlets ranked on how fairly they treat Cardano.

articles.title: Cardano Faces DDoS Attack At Block 10,487,530
articles.description: Cardano faced a Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attack starting at Block 10,487,530. But despite the ongoing attacks targeting its smart contracts, Cardano remains fully operational. This resilience is attributed to its decentralized design, which spreads the network load, preventing a single point of failure. The attack involved transactions executed through 194 smart contracts of …

articles.title: Congressman Proposes Bitcoin for Taxes
articles.description: US Congressman Matt Gaetz introduces a bill to allow federal income taxes to be paid in Bitcoin, potentially boosting cryptocurrency adoption in the US.

articles.title: Cardano Unfazed By Failed DDoS Attack Targeting Staked ADA
articles.description: No downtime was observed as a Cardano developer managed to attack the attacker and take back some funds.
